headline: Comfort Systems Stock Slides Post Q4 Results: Buy the Dip or Wait?
summary: FIX stock slips about 1% after stellar Q4 results. Does this dip offer a buying opportunity amid booming AI data center demand?

headline: Trump appointee proposes ripping out the White House's 200-year-old columns for the flashier style found at Mar-a-Lago
summary: That's just one line item on a White House renovation tab that critics say is ballooning well beyond what Americans were promised.
